title: Demokratien, Autokratien und Außenpolitik
further_info: Recommended Reading Einstiegsliteratur: Bader, Julia/Grävingholt, Jörn/Kästner, Antje 2010. Would Autocracies Promote Autocracy? in: Contemporary Politics 16(1): 81-100. Boldt, Damian. 2026. Democratic Transitions and International Conflict, in: International Interactions 52(1): 124-53. Braml, Josef et al. 2014. Außenpolitik mit Autokratien. Berlin: De Gruyter. Bueno de Mesquita, Bruce et al. 1999. An institutional explanation of the democratic peace, in: American Political Science Review 93(4): 791-807. Debre, Maria J, 2025. How Regional Organizations Sustain Authoritarian Rule: The Dictators' Club. Oxford: OUP. Doyle, Michael 2024. Why They Don’t Fight: The Surprising Endurance of the Democratic Peace, in: Foreign Affairs 103(4): 135-141. Geis, Anna et al. 2010. Liberale Demokratien und Krieg, in: Zeitschrift für Internationale Beziehungen 17(2): 171-201. Keohane, Robert O. et al. 2009. Democracy-Enhancing Multilateralism, in: International Organization 63(1): 1-31. Kneuer, Marianne 2013. Außenpolitik als Legitimationsstrategie autokratischer Regime, in: Kailitz, Steffen/Backes, Uwe (Hrsg.): Autokratien im Vergleich. Baden-Baden: Nomos, 205-237. Mattes, Michaela/Rodríguez, Mariana 2014. Autocracies and international cooperation, in: International Studies Quarterly 58(3): 527-538. Mousseau, Michael 2009. The Social Market Roots of Democratic Peace, in: International Security 33(4): 52-86. Owsiak, Andrew P./Vasquez, John A. 2022. The Limited Scope of the Democratic Peace, in: International Studies Perspectives 23(2): 169-190. Peceny, Mark et al. 2002. Dictatorial Peace? in: American Political Science Review 96(1): 15-26. Russett, Bruce/Oneal, John 2001. Triangulating Peace: Democracy. New York: Norton. Weeks, Jessica 2012. Strongmen and Straw Men: Authoritarian Regimes and the Initiation of International Conflict, in: American Political Science Review 106(2): 327-347.
